channel.title: Things on and them
channel.description: Recent content in Things on and them

item.title: a work in progress
item.description:
Starting somewhere is better than nowhere.

The urge to push out a fully polished site definitely exists. It often feels as though society requires us to present a realized and finished state of ourselves in every aspect of life. Here that is not the case.

If you’re looking at this site shortly after March 10th, 2026, you’ll see this site in true infancy. I’m choosing to publish things as I go rather than feeling pressured to churn out a bunch of half baked site-filler for the sake of making it feel ‘complete’. Aside from ‘complete’ not even being an idea I ascribe to, I’m confident this place will become what it needs in it’s own time.
